item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 88 pts (0.458) Buffalo Sabres – 86 pts (0.441) Tampa Bay Lightning – 82 pts (0.434) Montreal Canadiens – 80 pts (0.423) Pittsburgh Penguins – 79 pts (0.411) Detroit Red Wings – 79 pts (0.405) New York Islanders – 79 pts (0.405) Boston Bruins – 78 pts (0.406) Columbus Blue Jackets – 76 pts (0.396) Ottawa Senators – 73 pts (0.386) Washington Capitals – 71 pts (0.364) Philadelphia Flyers – 69 pts (0.365) Florida Panthers – 67 pts (0.349) New Jersey Devils – 66 pts (0.344) Toronto Maple Leafs – 65 pts (0.333) New York Rangers – 60 pts (0.312) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
